uid.description: A unique identifier for the user profile.

if_seq_no.description: Only perform the operation if the document has this sequence number.

if_primary_term.description: Only perform the operation if the document has this primary term.

refresh.description: If 'true', Elasticsearch refreshes the affected shards to make this operation visible to search. If 'wait_for', it waits for a refresh to make this operation visible to search. If 'false', nothing is done with refreshes.

labels.description: Searchable data that you want to associate with the user profile. This field supports a nested data structure. Within the labels object, top-level keys cannot begin with an underscore (`_`) or contain a period (`.`).

data.description: Non-searchable data that you want to associate with the user profile. This field supports a nested data structure. Within the `data` object, top-level keys cannot begin with an underscore (`_`) or contain a period (`.`). The data object is not searchable, but can be retrieved with the get user profile API.
